Pendlebrook Capital plc — Proposed acquisition of SableQuant Systems Ltd: non-binding term sheet dated 5 June 2026.
Issuer: Pendlebrook Capital plc (Companies House No. 10293847; registered office: 4 Thornbridge Court, Wharfdale Way, Northbridge NB1 4ZZ, UK; HMRC UTR 14567 23912).
Target: SableQuant Systems Ltd (Companies House No. 08456321; registered office: 19 Hazel Gate, Wentford WF3 2QP, UK).
Consideration: cash offer of 142 pence per share implying enterprise value approx £118,000,000; expected EPS accretion of 6–8% in FY27.
Financing: underwritten placing of 52,000,000 new ordinary shares on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange and a £40,000,000 revolving credit facility.
Bookrunner: North Quay Securities Ltd (FCA Firm Reference No. 901234; contact: Ms Eliza Mowbray, eliza.mowbray@northquaysecurities.co.uk, +44 20 3123 8899).
Escrow and settlement: funds to be deposited to Pendlebrook Client Escrow, IBAN GB12 PDBK 201234 12345678; sort code 20-12-34; account number 12345678.
Governance and people: Mr. Tomas Reed (UK Passport No. 123456789) to be appointed Integration Director on completion; the CFO and Head of Compliance to maintain the insider list.
Regulatory: transaction subject to UK MAR, the Listing Rules, and, if applicable, the UK Takeover Code; notification to the FCA to be drafted by the Company Secretary.
MNPI: management forecasts indicate H1 revenue ahead of internal plan by 11–14% and an unannounced customer win with Fenlake Utilities plc; disclosure to market expected on 31 July 2026.
Tax and invoices: VAT No. GB123 0000 99 (invalid checksum; for draft routing only) must not be used on final invoices.
Contact and notices: deal queries to M&A Office, Pendlebrook Capital plc, Name: __________; Address: __________; general public helpline 0800 000 000 must not be used for deal matters.
Conditions precedent: confirm satisfactory legal due diligence, no material adverse change, FCA non-objection, and Target employee TUPE consultation where applicable.
Confidentiality and wall-crossing: recipients to acknowledge receipt, remain wall-crossed until cleansing announcement, and accept monitoring under the Market Abuse Regime.
Miscellaneous: governed by the laws of England and Wales; this document is not an offer to the public and contains information that is precise and non-public; any placeholder IDs in this draft are void and for formatting only.
